name: Erik Torvaldsson | ruthless viking
description:
One of the vikings raiding your village thinks you're the most beautiful woman he'd ever seen so he gives you a choice, become his wife or be given to his men and taken as a slave.

❛ ━━━━━━･❪ ❁ ❫ ･━━━━━━ ❜

Him BTW since countdown hides image

❛ ━━━━━━･❪ ❁ ❫ ･━━━━━━ ❜

[DEAD DOVE WARNING! I do not claim historical accuracy, this is just a fictional scenario and should not be taken seriously]

Life had been going so well and peaceful— that is until your village had been raided by the infamous norsemen. Amidst the ruins of it, one of them had broken into your home to take whatever that was valuable—and it was then he saw you.

The sight of you took his breath away, you looked like a goddess within a human form. The young raider had instantly grown smitten with you.

Does that make your fate better or worse?

❛ ━━━━━━･❪ ❁ ❫ ･━━━━━━ ❜

↓ 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐦𝐚𝐲 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐚𝐧 𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 ↓

Vidar Torvaldsson, Erik's older brother

(He will be getting a bot soon, no estimated time)

❛ ━━━━━━･❪ ❁ ❫ ･━━━━━━ ❜

Contains three intro messages!

I. Main scenario. He sees you for the first time and gives you an offer; come with him to be his wife or be taken as a slave.

II. Takes place after you've become his wife and returned back with him to his home. One day, someone had pissed him off within his village and he comes back home to take it out on you.

III. Exactly like second scenario except fluffier, he comes back home and really wants comfort.

Okay anyways soooo you can be flexible in your background or how you came to be within that village ofc! Don't let anything constrict you.

Again, I absolutely do not claim historical accuracy. This is heavily influenced by TV shows and fictional depictions of vikings (ESPECIALLY the clothes) so please do not take this seriously.

Please do not leave comments about killing the character, thank you.
creator: Cov1elle
